name: @borjie/graph-database
description: SOTA-Graph-DB — unified graph-database abstraction for Borjie. Neo4j 5 primary, FalkorDB Redis-based fast in-memory alternative, Apache AGE Postgres-co-located fallback. Tenant-scoped Cypher builder, versioned migrations, audit-hash-chained query log, mining-domain wrappers (licence-permit hierarchy, supply-chain provenance, worker certifications, buyer network). Persona: Mr. Mwikila. Spec: Docs/DESIGN/GRAPH_DATABASE_SOTA_2026.md.
